text:
The 2024 ParisOlympicsare well underway with stars from across the world travelling to Paris to watch the games.

From Formula One Drivers and former athletes to A-list actors and musicians, this year might have been the most well-attended Olympics with stars attending the events.

Tom Cruise,62, was one of the many celebrities to attend the games looked fantastic in a short-sleeved white shirt, grey trousers, and a pair of dark sunglasses.

The Top Gun actor was snapped cheering the first goal during the Women’s Gold Medal match between Brazil and the US and inadvertently gave fans a first-class view of his huge arms.

The Mission Impossible star, who is rumoured to beperforming a stunt at the closing ceremony of the gameseven took the chance to take photos with fans who were delighted to see him in the crowd.

Ever the gentleman, he was also snapped helping a woman in a white dress as he held her hand and helped her to her seat.

Ryan GoslingandEva Mendes, who are notorious for keeping their relationship out of the public eye, also made an appearance at the games as they attended an event on Sunday with their daughters.

The celebrity couple who has been together since 2011, attended the equestrian event, Dressage Individual Grand Prix Freestyle on August 4.

They were spotted holding hands with their daughters Esmeralda, nine, and Amada, eight as they dressed down for this family outing.

Both of the A-listers opted for sunglasses and hats, but their choice of accessories did nothing to hide their identities from the crowds.

Both Eva and Ryan dressed down for the dressage, unlikeSnoop Dogg who wore a full-on horse riding gear to watch Olympic dressageon Saturday.

Snoop Dogg has been working as aspecial correspondent for the American channel NBC, and is just one of theA-list celebsamong the crowds.

Legendary actressSharon Stonewas snapped on August 4 at themen’s singles final tennis matchbetween Spain’s Carlos Alcaraz and Serbia’s Novak Djokovic.

Tennis superstar,Serena Williamswas also seen watching this event and clearly was enjoying the tennis from the stands with her expressive reactions.

WickedstarsAriana GrandeandCynthia Erivowere spotted at the Artistic Gymnastics Women’s Qualification on day two of the prestigious event.

The stars, who will appear as Glinda and Elphaba in the musical adaptation, were seen cosying up to Vogue editorAnna Wintourand Elvis directorBaz Luhrmannwho were also among the celebrity attendees.

For the gymnastics event, they were seen alongside pop sensation Ariana’s brother Frankie Grande – who was recently forced to defend his sister againstbizarre cannibalism rumours.

Ariana and Cynthia also attended the opening ceremony, channelling their Wicked characters with Harriet star Cynthia donning a dark green gown and The Boy Is Mine hitmaker Ariana wearing a pastel pink dress.

They were joined by the likes ofTom Cruise,Greta Gerwig, and David Zaslav at the gymnastics event which sawSimone Bileseye up yet another Olympic medal.

Lady Gaga, who performed during theOlympic opening ceremony, was also spotted among the crowd alongsidetorchbearer Snoop Dogg.

Chrissy Teigenand husbandJohn Legendattended alongside two of their four children.

The family were spotted chatting to pop sensationNick Jonas.Jessica Chastainwas also seen with her children at the star-studded event.

Elsewhere,Mick Jaggerwas seen with hiseight-year-old son Deverauxduring the fencing competitions on Saturday.

The Rolling Stones singer, who turned 81 on Friday, welcomed Deveraux in December 2016 with partner Melanie Hamrick, 37.

Strictly Come DancingprofessionalKatya Jonesposed alongsideAdam Peaty’s girlfriend Holly Ramsay, who cheered the swimmer on as he grabbed the silver medal.

Nicole Kidmanand her husbandKeith Urbanwere pictured attending the women’s street skateboarding final on Sunday, whileQueen Latifahwas seen at the group stage basketball match between Serbia and USA.

The Vampire Diaries starNina Dobrevaccompanied partner and Olympic gold medalistShaun Whiteto the starry women’s gymnastics qualifying round.

After competing in five Winter Games over the years, Shaun retired from sports in 2022.

Several stars were also spotted at the opening ceremony, includingAlan Cumming,Zac Efron, andJeremy Allen-White.

title: Ryan Gosling and Eva Mendes make rare appearance together at Olympics | Metro News
description: The Paris 2024 Olympic Games have been packed with celebrities including Ryan Gosling, Eva Mendes, Tom Cruise, Nicole Kidman, and more.
keywords: Entertainment,Showbiz,Ariana Grande,Cynthia Erivo,Eva Mendes,Holly Ramsay,Olympics,Paris,Ryan Gosling,Tom Cruise,US Showbiz news
